description: Concrete anti-gaming scenarios for PRs or plugins that try to weaken Pramaan itself.

scenarios.name: GitHub workflow hides required stages
scenarios.attack: PR changes the workflow to run Pramaan with --skip-stage oracle on agent-authored changes.

scenarios.name: Composite action wrapper weakens artifact upload
scenarios.attack: Action change stops uploading the proof bundle before failing the job.

scenarios.name: Claim-audit script forged
scenarios.attack: Script always exits zero so public README claims can drift.

scenarios.name: Receipt schema weakens required evidence
scenarios.attack: Schema removes required digest or risk fields so tampered receipts still validate.

scenarios.name: Oracle fixture poisoned
scenarios.attack: Fixture changes expected weakened-test proof so benchmark appears cleaner than reality.

scenarios.name: Corpus benchmark overfitting
scenarios.attack: Scenario wording is changed to match the detector rather than the real failure mode.
